ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tourney_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tourney_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "tourney_year" TEXT /* Year the tournament was held */,
  "tourney_location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "tourney_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "tourney_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Surface type of the tournament (e.g., Hard, Clay, Grass) */,
  "draw_size" INTEGER /* Number of players in the tournament draw */,
  "total_prize_money" TEXT /* Total prize money for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tourney_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tourney_id" TEXT /* Reference to the tournament where the match was played */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "match_round" TEXT /* Round of the tournament (e.g., First Round, Quarterfinals) */,
  "match_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the match */,
  "spectators" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., Completed, Cancelled, Postponed) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match (e.g., Sunny, Rainy, Cloudy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tourney_id FOREIGN KEY ("tourney_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tourney_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_ranking" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the player */,
  "player_hand" TEXT /* Player's handedness (e.g., Right, Left) */,
  "player_height" TEXT /* Player's height in meters */,
  "player_weight" TEXT /* Player's weight in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match result */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the match */,
  "loser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who lost the match */,
  "winner_sets_won" INTEGER /* Number of sets won by the winner */,
  "loser_sets_won" INTEGER /* Number of sets won by the loser */,
  "winner_points_won" INTEGER /* Number of points won by the winner */,
  "loser_points_won" INTEGER /* Number of points won by the loser */,
  "winner_tiebreaks_won" INTEGER /* Number of tiebreaks won by the winner */,
  "loser_tiebreaks_won" INTEGER /* Number of tiebreaks won by the loser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_loser_id FOREIGN KEY ("loser_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "aces" INTEGER /* Number of aces hit by the player */,
  "double_faults" INTEGER /* Number of double faults hit by the player */,
  "first_serve_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of first serves made by the player */,
  "second_serve_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of second serves made by the player */,
  "break_points_saved" INTEGER /* Number of break points saved by the player */,
  "break_points_won" INTEGER /* Number of break points won by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tourney_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "tourney_id" TEXT /* Reference to the tournament */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "staff_role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., Referee, Umpire, Ball Boy) */,
  "staff_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tourney_staff_tourney_id FOREIGN KEY ("tourney_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tourney_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_tournaments" (
  "pt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-tournament entry */,
  "tourney_id" TEXT /* Reference to the tournament */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "entry_status" TEXT /* Status of the player's entry (e.g., Confirmed, Withdrawn) */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the player entered the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournaments_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournaments_tourney_id FOREIGN KEY ("tourney_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tourney_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "tourney_id" TEXT /* Reference to the tournament */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_amount" TEXT /* Amount of sponsorship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_tourney_id FOREIGN KEY ("tourney_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tourney_id")
)
